hero.title: Know what students <highlight>really think</highlight> about your courses
hero.subtitle: Anonymous feedback from verified students

contribute_cta.title: Share what you wish you'd known.
contribute_cta.subtitle: Give feedback once, helps hundreds of students for years.

contribute_strip.text: Taken a course? Leave a review →

browse.title: Browse Courses
browse.desc: Search and filter hundreds of courses to find the ones that fit your interests and criteria.

read.title: Read Feedback
read.desc: See what past students say about the course, its contents, workload, teaching style, etc.

enroll.title: Enroll With Confidence
enroll.desc: Use what you learned to choose the right courses for you.

verified.title: Reviews You Can Trust
verified.subtitle: Verified Feedback
verified.desc: We manually review and approve every feedback to ensure it comes from a student who actually took the course.

anonymous.title: 100% Anonymous
anonymous.desc: Your feedback is always anonymous, and we never disclose information about the students who submit it.

space.title: A space that belongs to students
space.desc: Uni Feedback is student-run and independent from any university. No institution can influence what gets published here. Here you'll find the good, the bad, and the ugly.

real_students.title: Only real students, from real universities
real_students.desc: We want our feedback to be legit. Every contributor authenticates with their university email before submitting.

anonymous_submissions.title: Your feedback is 100% anonymous
anonymous_submissions.desc: We want students to feel safe sharing their experience. Nobody, not other students, not professors, not your university, will ever know you wrote it.
anonymous_submissions.note: Internally, your submission is linked to your account so you can manage it, and so our team can reach out if something needs attention. That link never leaves Uni Feedback.

reviewed.title: All feedback is reviewed
reviewed.desc: We read every submission. If something doesn't follow our <0>guidelines</0>, we remove it and reach out to help the author update it, so it can go back up. Every opinion is welcome. All of them.

testimonials.title: What students say about us
testimonials.subtitle: Real students sharing their experience with Uni Feedback
testimonials.cta: Using Uni Feedback? Tell us what you think!

browse_section.title: What are you studying?
browse_section.no_degrees: No degrees available for this university yet.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Uni Feedback

items.question: Is Uni Feedback affiliated with my university?
items.answer: **No.** This is a student-run platform, independent from any university. No institution controls what gets published here. Students share their honest experience freely.

items.question: Can professors see who wrote a review?
items.answer: **No.** Professors can read reviews, but they'll never know who wrote what. Your identity is never revealed to anyone. Not to professors, other students, or your university.

items.question: How do I know reviews are real?
items.answer: Every contributor signs in with their university email before submitting. Your email is never displayed or shared.

items.question: Do I need to create an account to submit feedback?
items.answer: You need to authenticate with your university email to submit. When you do it for the first time, an account is automatically created.

items.question: My course isn't listed. What can I do?
items.answer: [Reach out to me!](mailto:afonso@uni-feedback.com) I'll be happy to add your course, degree, or university.

items.question: What language should I write my feedback in?
items.answer: Write in the language you're most comfortable with.

items.question: How long until my review appears after I submit it?
items.answer: **Your feedback is published immediately.** I read every submission. If something doesn't follow our [guidelines]({{guidelinesUrl}}), I'll reach out and let you know.

items.question: Can I edit or delete my feedback after submitting?
items.answer: **Yes.** Go to your [profile page](/en/profile) to see all the feedback you've submitted. You can edit or delete it from there.

items.question: Who runs Uni Feedback? Is it a company?
items.answer: Uni Feedback is run by me, Afonso. I'm someone who really wants to help students make more informed decisions.

items.question: What happens if I see a review that seems fake or unfair?
items.answer: You can report it. Whenever I receive a report, I'll re-evaluate the review and remove it if it doesn't follow our [guidelines]({{guidelinesUrl}}).

faq.contact_prompt: Have another question? DM us on <0>Instagram</0> or write to <1>afonso@uni-feedback.com</1>.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Join a growing community of students making better academic decisions

more_than_network.quote: Sometimes the <highlight>most useful feedback</highlight> comes from someone we've <highlight>never met</highlight>.
more_than_network.desc: Here you can find feedback from hundreds students. Not just those you happen to know.

loved_by_students.title: Loved by Hundreds of Students at

feedback_carousel.subtitle: Browse hundreds of reviews from students like you

founder.quote1: In university, my friends and I would often ask other students about courses (workload, professors, exams, tips, etc.). But the answers would get lost in group chats.
founder.quote2: So I built a place for all that feedback.

contact_section.title: Get in Touch
contact_section.desc: Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you. Your feedback (😉) helps make Uni Feedback better for everyone.
